summary: Tested server.py refactoring into route modules. 25 backend tests pass verifying all major API endpoints work. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: routes/tax.py is missing 3 endpoints (export-summary, save-categories, export-schedule-d) and export-form-8949 has incorrect function call (missing symbol, address, filter_type arguments).

issues.description: Missing endpoints in routes/tax.py: /api/tax/export-summary, /api/tax/save-categories, /api/tax/export-schedule-d. These endpoints existed in the original server.py but were not included in the refactored routes/tax.py module.

Incorrect function call in export-form-8949 endpoint. generate_form_8949_csv() is called with only realized_gains argument, but it requires symbol, address, and filter_type arguments. Original code: tax_report_service.generate_form_8949_csv(realized_gains=..., symbol=..., address=..., filter_type=...). Current broken code: tax_report_service.generate_form_8949_csv(realized_gains)
issues.reproduction: curl -X POST https://crypto-tax-tracker-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/tax/export-form-8949 -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' -d '{...}' returns 500 with 'missing 2 required positional arguments: symbol and address'

issues.description: Inconsistent endpoint naming in routes/wallets.py: /wallet/analyze (singular) vs /wallets/saved (plural). Consider using consistent naming convention.

action_items: Add missing endpoints to routes/tax.py: export-summary, save-categories, export-schedule-d (copy from git show d38edb532a0d951de9303fe7bf324e38cba026c0:backend/server.py)
Fix export-form-8949 endpoint to pass correct arguments: generate_form_8949_csv(realized_gains=realized_gains, symbol=symbol, address=address or 'exchange', filter_type=request.filter_type)

test_results.frontend: N/A - No frontend changes in this refactoring

context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py was refactored into 10 route modules under /app/backend/routes/. Most endpoints work correctly after refactoring. CRITICAL: routes/tax.py is missing 3 endpoints and has a bug in export-form-8949. After fixing, run test_tax_features.py to verify the missing endpoints work. The test file test_refactored_routes.py verifies all working route modules.
